StructurePhase.Reference: Dekhtyar I.Y., Miniev M., Sakharova S.G., Fedchenko R.G., Phys. Status Solidi A, v13 pK17 (1972)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO. LPF Collection Code: 375041. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Co,Al. Compound Preparation: induction-melted in argon. Article Title: Positron Annihilation on CoAl Alloys. Minor Warning: No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: b a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Deganello F., Liotta L.F., Longo A., Casaletto M.P., Scopelliti M., J. Solid State Chem., v179 p3406-3419 (2006)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1817043. Sample Preparation: STARTINGMATERIALS: Sr ( N O3 )2, Fe ( N O3 )3. COMPOUND PREPARATION: dissolved in water, citric acid, ammonium and ammonia nitrate added, dried at 343 K, burned, heated at 1273 K for 4 h in air, heated at 1273 K in Ar/H2 atmosphere, cooled in He atmosphere. Article Title: Cerium effect on the phase structure, phase stability and redox properties of Ce-doped strontium ferrates. Minor Warning: Only profile R factor reported/abstracted. Magnitude of e.s.d. on cell dimension is >1000 ppm. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
